news.title: Q&A: Do AI and bogus respondents threaten polling’s future?
news.summary_en: Courtney Kennedy, vice president of methods and innovation, answers some common questions about the current polling landscape in the U.S.

news.title: Americans See Health Care Costs, Deficit, Inflation as Big Problems Facing the Nation
news.summary_en: Economic issues continue to dominate Americans’ ranking of the country’s top problems. Meanwhile, the share who say illegal immigration is a very big problem has dropped since the start of Trump’s second term.
